title: Isaac Linder
body:
# Isaac Linder

Denver experimental sound-art musician and writer; performs as **ilind**. Featured by 303 Magazine and Westword's "56 Reasons Why" Denver experimental scene roundup. Operates the AW/OA (Abstract without Abstraction) blog/Bandcamp documenting boundary-bending soundscapes from "harshest gabber to recordings of reverberating healing stones." Recorded live solo XDJ-RX CDJ sets with no input/edits/overdubbing.

## Connection to Colin

Track 1 of REMIX10: **"ISAAC LINDER-1x1x1 (1/26 mix)"** — Colin remixed Linder's "1x1x1" with the mix-name "1/26 mix" (likely a date reference).
